/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsift_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libsift_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/sift_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sift_interfaces/msg/detail/image_features__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sberk/Desktop/paralel/build/sift_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libsift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
